description: Glitzy copper pumps in the classic peep-toe slingback design with a midfoot twist. For a high-glamour evening, this is the right foot-style choice. keep the accessories metallic and tonal, and the ensemble simple and elegant.heels: 3.5"Product DetailsMetallic tones on the synthetic upperElastication at the backfootElastication detail across the midfootPadded footbed with embossed brandingTPU outsole with a stiletto style straight-heelTextured design on the heel cap for added comfortMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
